formulas.name: ExecutionName
formulas.expression: LEFT( TRIM( IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-V-", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1120'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210')), "SB-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210'), "SB-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410')), "T4S-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410'), "T4S", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '4110'), "CH-", "ES-" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) + IF( ISNULL({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), "--", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), 11) ) + "-" + {!$Record.Area_Corta__c} + "-" + RIGHT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Codigo_de_oportunidad__c}, 4) + "-" + LEFT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Name}, 11) ), 40 )

formulas.name: Name
formulas.expression: LEFT( TRIM( IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-V-", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1120'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210')), "SB-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210'), "SB-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410')), "T4S-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410'), "T4S", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '4110'), "CH-", "ES-" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) + IF( ISNULL({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), "--", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), 11) ) + "-" +'PS-'+ {!$Record.Area_Corta__c} + "-" + RIGHT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Codigo_de_oportunidad__c}, 4) + "-" + LEFT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Name}, 11) ), 40 )
